title: 体重に関与するシナリオ※タイトル記載

text_block_list.text:
I spot Hishi Amazon and Fuji Kiseki spending their
lunch break at the cafeteria, so I head over to
join them.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
My, my, aren't you a hearty eater. Isn't that your
fourth slice of cake?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I've gotta fill up 'cause I can't afford to fail my
make-up exam!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Let me know if you need more. I could fetch you
another slice or three!
choice_data_list:
What does cake have to do with your make-up
exam?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Hey, Teach! Glad you asked!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sugar gets your mind racing, right? With this
much energy, I'm bound to pass the test!
choice_data_list: But won't things backfire if you eat too much?
Yeah! Chow down and ace that test!
Yeah! Chow down and ace that test!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Sugar gets your mind racing, right? With this
much energy, I'm bound to pass the test!
choice_data_list: But won't things backfire if you eat too much?
Yeah! Chow down and ace that test!
Yeah! Chow down and ace that test!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
I dunno, but sweets are like fuel for your brain,
right?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
The way I see it, more power means more
thinking. Right, Fuji?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
I agree—the more fuel, the better. Although I
suppose eating too much might send you into a
food coma.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Fuji... You're just egging me on for giggles, aren't
you?

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Of course not! I believe you capable of surpassing
any tribulations that may come your way, be it
drowsiness or a make-up exam!
choice_data_list: Either way, moderation is your best bet.
Either way, moderation is your best bet.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Hmm... You'd be the one to know, Teach, so I'll
lay off the cake for now.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: Well! You sure trust your trainer's judgment a lot.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, trust comes naturally when we're workin' as
a team.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text: Here, you can have this last slice, Teach!

Having properly moderated her sugar intake,
Hishi Amazon goes off to conquer her make-up
exam with gusto.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, I've got this! History, math—they're all
going down!

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text: That's the spirit! I'll go get more cake for you.

text_block_list.name: Fuji Kiseki
text_block_list.text:
Actually, you know what? I'll just grab an entire
cake! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Amazon
text_block_list.text:
Bring it on! I'll stuff myself full and make quick
work of my exam!

Hishi Amazon crams her notes while scarfing down
the cake, then heads off to face her exam...
